title: Meteor and Eruption Coincide Over Mount Mayon, Sparking UFO Speculation and Scientific Explanation
description: A green fireball streaked behind an erupting Mount Mayon, followed by a mysterious white light. Experts explain the event as a satellite glint and a coincidental, spectacular capture of a meteor disintegrating in the atmosphere.

title: More UFO records released by Pentagon under transparency directive
description: The Pentagon unsealed more secret UFO and UAP records under a new transparency directive, revealing military videos and files.

title: UFO whistleblower analyzes new military footage | Newsmaker
description: A ufologist is detailing military encounters and a sixth observable involving biological effects on personnel. Jeremy Corbell joins Newsmaker to discuss his documentary Sleeping Dog and declassified military footage of Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena.

title: Harvard Physicist Explains Mysterious Orb Over Erupting Volcano: It's Not a UFO
description: A Harvard professor says a bright orb seen rising behind Mount Mayon after a meteor strike was likely a satellite glint, not a UFO. The event was captured on video and sparked widespread curiosity.
